title: Smoky Australian Lamb Skewers
description: A peppery and crisp weeknight Australian dish featuring lamb, this recipe is perfect for a lacto-vegetarian friendly meal, grilled to perfection on a robata grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, black pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the lamb skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the lamb is cooking, mix the lemon juice and yogurt in a small bowl.
Once the lamb is cooked, serve with the yogurt sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
